---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a detector, hypercall, or platform addition
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

What attack / workflow / deployment scenario is currently
unaddressed by GhostRing?  Link MITRE ATT&CK / CVE / vendor write-up
if relevant.

## Proposed feature

Short description.  If this is a new detector, which alert-type ID
would it emit and what would the evidence payload look like?

## Which roadmap milestone?

v0.2 / v0.3 / v1.0 / out-of-scope.  See `docs/ROADMAP.md`.

## Implementation sketch (optional)

Rough idea of how you would build it.  Not required — a clear problem
statement is already useful.
